# Gregor Krykon

> Automation Engineer & Full-Stack Developer based in Grafing bei München, Bavaria, Germany.

## About

Gregor Krykon is a software developer specializing in automation, CI/CD, test automation, and full-stack web development. He works as an apprentice software developer (Fachinformatiker Anwendungsentwicklung) at FELLOWPRO AG and runs freelance web projects under the brand 922 Studio.

## Skills

Python, Vue.js, Next.js, FastAPI, Docker, Kubernetes, Helm, GitHub Actions, Playwright, Tailwind CSS, Shopware, WordPress

## Projects

- krimispiele.com — Shopware e-commerce setup and management
- samhain-verlag.de — WordPress site management
- krimidinnerverzeichnis.de — Custom HTML/JS directory for crime dinner events
